summary: The protagonist navigates a complex web of investigation and deception, involving a dangerous encounter at a restaurant related to the Nine Heavens Sect and a public scandal involving match-fixing in the Korean Arena League. After interrogating individuals connected to a corrupt plot, the protagonist orchestrates a major legal move by Prosecutor Kim Junsik to expose the match-fixing ring. With the authorities focused on the scandal, the protagonist turns their attention to finalizing unfinished business with Heaven's Pavilion.
key_moments: The protagonist investigates a suspicious store and encounters a girl connected to the Nine Heavens Sect.
The protagonist uncovers a conspiracy involving Jintae and a high-ranking official within the Nine Heavens Sect.
Prosecutor Kim Junsik announces a massive crackdown on match-fixing in the professional gaming league during a press conference.
The protagonist prepares to resolve affairs with Heaven's Pavilion following the public scandal.
